1100.t: Powers on a Different Level! Luffy vs. Lucci!
1100.s: At Marine Headquarters, Sakazuki learns of the situation at Egghead and orders Lucci not to face Luffy until Kizaru arrives with back-up, but he is ignored and they attack each other using their new awakened states. As Dr. Vegapunk explains to Sanji's group about Devil Fruits, he convinces Sentomaru to join their side. This forces Lucci to knock out Sentomaru to regain control of the Seraphim.

1101.t: The Strongest Form of Humanity! The Seraphim's Abilities!
1101.s: As the battle continues at Fabiriophase with Sentomaru barely conscious, Dr. Vegapunk in the meantime explains to Sanji's group about the Seraphim and their abilities. Once Jinbe and Chopper get to the Vacuum Rocket, they and Luffy then escape to Labophase as the lockdown is completed and Sentomaru passes out.

1102.t: Sinister Schemes! The Operation to Escape Egghead
1102.s: As plans are made for Dr. Vegapunk to escape Egghead on the Thousand Sunny, Lucci has his forces cut off all means of escape. However, the Labophase's defense system suddenly goes down, allowing CP0 to progress forward towards the Thousand Sunny. Elsewhere, at the Red Line, Kuma crashes into the Red Port.

1103.t: Turn Back My Father! Bonney's Futile Wish!
1103.s: Kaku attempts to destroy the Thousand Sunny, but is stopped by Zoro. Bonney chases Dr. Vegapunk, demanding to know the truth about her father before finding one of Kuma's paw-shaped repulsions. Meanwhile, the Marines engage Kuma at Red Port, the Kid Pirates arrive at Elbaph, and Garp arrives at G-14, intent on leading a mission to rescue Koby.

1104.t: A Desperate Situation! The Seraphim's All-out Attack!
1104.s: Zoro battles Kaku to which the latter demonstrates his awakened abilities. Sanji, Franky, Lilith and Edison head out to regain control of the Seraphim as Lucci orders them to destroy the lab. However, Stussy betrays CP0, and knocks out Lucci and Kaku.

1105.t: A Beautiful Act of Treason! The Spy, Stussy
1105.s: Stussy is revealed to be Dr. Vegapunk's spy, as Sanji's group successfully stops the Seraphim. Meanwhile at Sphinx, Marco learns that Weevil protected the residents while he was away, and Miss Buckin reveals that Weevil was captured and asks Marco to help her rescue him. Elsewhere, while on their way to Egghead, Kizaru and Saturn talk about Dr. Vegapunk.

1106.s: A recovered Sentomaru dispatches the Pacifista MK-III to deal with the World Government agents. Bonney begins exploring her father's memories. Shaka reveals the situation including that Dr. Vegapunk is missing. While Luffy and Zoro remain behind to guard Lucci and Kaku, the others head out to look for Dr. Vegapunk.

1107.t: A Shudder! The Evil Hand Creeping Up on the Laboratory
1107.s: After experiencing one of her father's memories, Bonney decides to continue to learn the truth. Meanwhile, as Kuma is climbing the Red Line to Mary Geoise, the search for Dr. Vegapunk gets more complicated when the communications and surveillance goes down, causing Shaka to suspect an intruder. Then S-Snake suddenly turns York into stone.

1108.s: As the Seraphim begin their attack, Shaka suspects one of the other Satellites has ordered the Seraphim to kill them all. Realizing they too are in danger, Lucci and Kaku attempt to convince a reluctant Luffy and Zoro into freeing them so they can assist in repelling the Seraphim's attack.

1109.t: A Tough Decision! An Unusual United Front!
1109.s: As the Straw Hat Pirates struggle against the Seraphim, Luffy reluctantly decides to release Lucci and Kaku, allowing them to join the fight. Meanwhile at Elbaph, Shanks learns of Kid's presence and accepts his challenge with the Road Poneglyph copies as the prize, and also has Giant Warrior Pirates accompany him.

1110.t: Survive! Deadly Combat with the Strongest Form of Humanity!
1110.s: Zoro realizes that the Seraphim have King's Lunarian abilities. Sanji arrives to help Nami and Brook against S-Shark, and S-Snake partially turns Franky to stone while completely petrifying Usopp and Lilith. Meanwhile, Shaka tracks down Dr. Vegapunk while following a lead, only to be killed by a mysterious assassin.

1111.t: The Second Ohara! The Mastermind's Ambition!
1111.s: As the battles progress, Sentomaru warns the researchers that this incident will be bigger than the Ohara Incident and urges them to flee while S-Snake finishes off Pythagoras. It is revealed that the Egghead Incident began three months ago when York leaked Dr. Vegapunk's research to the Five Elders, intent on becoming both a World Noble and the only Vegapunk.

1112.s: Shanks heads out to face Kid, but when he sees a vision of Kid's attack destroying a number of his allies' ships, he launches a major attack which takes down Kid and Killer in a single strike. Dorry and Brogy, in retaliation for Kid's reckless attack threatening Elbaph, destroy the Victoria Punk, leaving the Kid Pirates utterly defeated.

1113.t: Run, Koby! A Desperate Escape Strategy!
1113.s: With Perona's help, Koby is able to escape. After freeing the Blackbeard Pirates' slaves, he attempts to act as a decoy to help them escape, but is spotted and soon cornered. Just as he is about to be killed, the island is attacked by the Marine unit led by Garp.

1114.t: For the Beloved Pupil - The Fist of Vice Admiral Garp!
1114.s: Garp launches a major attack on Hachinosu, which devastates the island. Just as Koby reaches the Marines' ship, they are attacked by their former comrade Kuzan, now one of the Blackbeard Pirates Ten Titanic Captains. A flashback occurs to when Kuzan met Blackbeard after he had left the Marines.

1115.t: The Marines Surprised! Marine Headquarters' Former Admiral, Kuzan
1115.s: In the past, after having some drinks with the Blackbeard Pirates, Kuzan is convinced by Blackbeard to join them. In the present, Kuzan faces his former mentor Garp in battle. Meanwhile, at Winner Island, Blackbeard has defeated Law. This forces Bepo to use a special drug to briefly enter Sulong form to save his captain and then he escapes with Law to the sea.

1116.t: Let's Go Get It! Buggy's Big Declaration
1116.s: As the Marines deal with the issues the Cross Guild is causing them, Buggy in the meantime decides to declare to his men that they should go after the One Piece, which irritates both Mihawk and Crocodile. Meanwhile at Momoiro Island, Sabo returns with refugees from Lulusia Kingdom. He decides to have a private meeting with Dragon and Ivankov to tell them what really happened at the Levely.

1117.t: Sabo Returns - The Shocking Truth to Be Told!
1117.s: After Sabo makes his report about his mission to Mary Geoise, he begins his story to Dragon and Ivankov about what happened. As the flashback begins, the Revolutionary Army began their attack, freeing the slaves and dealing with the opposition from the World Government forces. Meanwhile, Charlos plans a second attempt to capture Princess Shirahoshi and King Cobra prepares for his meeting with the Five Elders.

1118.t: The Holy Land in Tumult! Sai and Leo's Full-Power Blow!
1118.s: After obtaining the keys to the slaves' collars and meeting Bonney, Sabo heads to find the Lost Chamber. Meanwhile, Cobra asks the Five Elders about the fate of his ancestor Lili, though they have no information for him. Outside, Charlos uses Kuma to capture Shirahoshi, but he is stopped by Mjosgard allowing Sai and Leo to intervene; in the resulting chaos, the Revolutionary Army grabs Kuma and escapes. As he asks his second question regarding the mystery of the Will of D., Imu appears and sits on the Empty Throne, shocking Cobra.

1119.t: The Entrusted Message! King Cobra's Resolve
1119.s: Imu tells Cobra about the truth of the Will of D. and the Poneglyphs and demands to know Lili's true name. Knowing they will kill him anyway, Cobra reveals her true name is Nefeltari D. Lili. Sabo intervenes and tries to escape with Cobra, but Cobra sacrifices himself to allow Sabo to flee, but not before he gives his final message for Luffy and Vivi. Wapol sees this and escapes in panic, to which Vivi uses this to escape from CP0 and the two flee Mary Geoise together.

1120.t: The World Is Shaken! The Ruler's Judgment and the Five Elders' Actions!
1120.s: Sabo, Vivi, Wapol, and Bonney all escape from Mary Geoise by stowing away on ships, as Imu decides to test the Mother Flame on the Lulusia Kingdom. Sabo finishes his story with what happened at Lulusia when it was destroyed. Ivankov suspects that the Imu Sabo met might be one of the First Twenty. Meanwhile, at Mary Geoise, Mjosgard is executed by Garling for defending the Ryugu Kingdom's royal family.

1121.t: Garp and Kuzan - A Clash of Justice Between Master and Apprentice
1121.s: As the battle at Hachinosu continues, just as the Marines' ship is prepared for departure, a mistake that Koby makes results in Garp getting injured by Shiryu. As Garp faces off against his former pupil Kuzan, flashbacks are seen of their training together. Meanwhile, Pizarro prepares to destroy the Marine ship.

1122.s: As Pizarro prepares his attack on the Marine ship, Garp gives his men some instructions. Once he attacks Pizarro, Koby, after remembering his harsh training, unleashes a powerful Armament Haki attack on the giant stone hand to help and protect their ship. Garp then orders them to leave him behind, reminding them of what is important. Meanwhile, a Marine Fleet approaches Egghead.

1123.t: The World Shakes! The Straw Hats' Hostage Situation
1123.s: As the news spreads throughout the world of Garp's disappearance and the hostage situation regarding Dr. Vegapunk, the repercussions of Lulusia Kingdom's destruction affects the entire world. As Admiral Kizaru's forces surround Egghead, York contacts them to reveal she had been caught by the Straw Hat Pirates.

1124.t: Completely Surrounded! The Operation to Escape Egghead
1124.s: After Luffy attempts to force a deal for the Marines to allow the Straw Hat Pirates to leave Egghead, both groups plan their next move. However, when Lucci secretly leaks information on Egghead's current status, it allows the Marines to begin their attack, with Kizaru heading in and targeting Sentomaru first.

1125.t: A Clash of Two Men's Determination! Kizaru and Sentomaru
1125.s: Kizaru defeats Sentomaru, allowing him to gain control of the Pacifista Mark IIIs to deal with the Sea Beast Weapons. As the Vegapunks continue to try to crack York's password, Lucci tries to kill Dr. Vegapunk, but Stussy takes the hit, and Zoro engages him in battle. Just as Kizaru reaches the Frontier Dome, he spots Luffy's group, and Luffy engages him in battle.

1126.t: Looming Despair! Admiral Kizaru's Depressing Mission
1126.s: Kuma's attack on Mary Geoise the previous day is revealed to have been thwarted by Fleet Admiral Sakazuki. Meanwhile, Kizaru knocks away Luffy, which also destroys the Vegaforce-01. Before Kizaru can kill Vegapunk, Luffy returns in his Gear 5 form, which causes the nearby Iron Giant to awaken.

1127.t: Luffy vs. Kizaru! A Fierce Kaleidoscopic Battle
1127.s: After Luffy draws away Kizaru, it allows a group to be formed to both rescue Bonney and regain control of the Mark III Pacifista. As Luffy and Zoro continue their individual battles, the Vegatank-08 reaches its destination, and Atlas succeeds in regaining control of the Pacifista and turning them against the Marines.

1128.t: The Nightmare Strikes - Warrior God of Science and Defense, Saint Saturn
1128.s: After Sanji rescues Bonney, the Vegatank-08's retreat is cut off when Saint Saturn shows up to fight. Luffy manages to take Kizaru down as he reaches his limit with Gear 5. An angry Bonney then attacks Saturn, in retaliation for his role in taking away Kuma's free will.

1129.t: Kuma's Past - Better Off Dead in This World
1129.s: Saturn easily heals from Bonney's attack, capturing her and overwhelming the rest of the group. The story of Kuma's past then begins with his birth 47 years ago, before his family's capture a few years later. 38 years ago, after his parents are murdered, a competition is held on God Valley by the World Nobles, where Kuma meets and befriends fellow slaves Ivankov and Ginny.

1130.t: A History Erased! God Valley Of Despair
1130.s: As a result of Ginny leaking information about the competition, the Roger Pirates and Rocks Pirates invade God Valley. Kuma's group plan to steal the Devil Fruit prizes to escape, and though Linlin stole the one Ivankov took, Kuma succeeds in eating the other one, allowing his group and 500 other slaves to escape. Later, after parting ways with Ivankov, Kuma and Ginny begin their new life of freedom together.

1131.t: A Fleeting Moment of Happiness - Kumachi and Ginny
1131.s: Flashing ahead to thirty years before the present, Kuma and Ginny are living in a church in Sorbet Kingdom. Then eight years later, the King Bekori attempts to enslave the poor elderly townsfolk, forcing Kuma and the Freedom Fighters to take action, which leads to the creation of the Revolutionary Army. Then years later, fourteen years before the present, Ginny is reported to have been kidnapped by an unknown assailant.

1132.t: A Pledge to Ginny - Kuma Becomes a Father
1132.s: Two years after Ginny was kidnapped by a World Noble to be his wife, she returned to Sorbet Kingdom with a terminal illness, leaving Kuma to raise Bonney as his own daughter. He raised Bonney for years, but learned she inherited Ginny's disease and would not live to be ten years old. As soon as he learned, Bekori reinstated his old law, legalizing slavery once again.

1133.t: To Save His Daughter - Kuma the Timid Pacifist
1133.s: After thwarting Bekori's first and later second attempt to regain power with the Marines's help, Kuma becomes an official criminal. Traveling the world to seek a cure for Bonney's illness, Kuma later reunites with Dragon who tells him about Dr. Vegapunk. He and Bonney then go to meet with Vegapunk, who offers Kuma to be a model for a cyborg project, in exchange for providing the cure.

1134.t: Cruel Fate - Kuma's Decision as a Father
1134.s: Due to eavesdropping on their previous conversation, upon Borsalino's arrival, Saint Saturn forces some additional conditions on Kuma, including becoming a Warlord of the Sea and a Cyborg stripped of all memories. Six months later, Bonney is allowed to return to Sorbet Kingdom for her remaining treatment while under surveillance.

1135.t: To the Sea Where My Father is! The Future Bonney Chooses
1135.s: After witnessing Luffy train and remembering a conversation he had with Dragon, Kuma finishes his business in the East Blue, unaware the letters he sends to Bonney are being intercepted and destroyed by Alpha. Even after Bonney is cured, Alpha refuses for her to leave, but Conney's suspicions are confirmed. With the help of Conney and some townspeople, Bonney escapes Alpha and departs out to sea.

1136.s: Kuma during the last few days of his free will witnesses the progress of the Straw Hat and Bonney Pirates throughout Paradise, including separating the Straw Hats so they could train and one day save the world. Before the procedure starts, Kuma warns Vegapunk the memory bubble will disappear if someone touches it, which comes true in the present after Bonney saw her father's memories with it.

1137.t: I'm Sorry, Dad - Bonney's Tears and Kuma's Fist
1137.s: After Bonney comes out of the memory bubble, Vegapunk gives her the gift Kuma had for her tenth birthday. In the present, as Luffy consumes food to regain his strength, Bonney finds her ageing power does not work against Saturn, who reveals he was responsible for her having Devil Fruit powers and for Ginny contracting Sapphire Scales. Before Bonney can be killed, Kuma arrives and punches Saturn.

1138.t: Thank You, Dad - Bonney and Kuma's Warm Embrace
1138.s: After Saturn was knocked away Kuma and Bonney embrace, as Vegapunk wonders why Kuma is still moving due to a failsafe that should have stopped him earlier. After Saturn recovers, Sanji and Franky protect the immobile Kuma, while Atlas gets him out of the area. Saturn then decides to invoke the Buster Call to eliminate Kuma, Bonney, Vegapunk, and the Straw Hat Pirates for good.

1139.t: Destroy Egghead - The Buster Call is Invoked
1139.s: As the Marines prepare for the Buster Call, Dr. Vegapunk fails to convince St. Saturn to call it off, while Sanji calls Nami, and she informs him of Zoro, Jinbe, and Brook's current actions. As the bombardment begins, Kizaru prevents Franky's group from escaping, and the Pacifistas are ordered to kill them. Elsewhere at sea, a downed Marine unit plans to warn Kizaru that a new force is approaching Egghead.

1140.t: An Admired Hero - The Warrior of Liberation Who Saves Bonney
1140.s: As Luffy reenters Gear 5, Atlas reveals to Bonney the secret of the Pacifistas, allowing her to gain control of them. As an angry Saturn stabs Vegapunk, Luffy arrives and engages Kizaru, and Vegapunk reveals to Bonney that Luffy is Nika. Elsewhere, the Iron Giant activates, while the Giant Warrior Pirates arrive to assist the Straw Hat Pirates.

1141.t: Reliable Reinforcements! Dorry and Brogy Arrive!
1141.s: The Giant Warrior Pirates begin their attack as Dorry and Brogy move on ahead. As the other members of the Straw Hat Pirates continue their plan to escape Egghead, Luffy fights Saturn and Sanji fights Kizaru. However, Devon and Augur of the Blackbeard Pirates arrive for a mission, and while leaving, Caribou asks to go with them.

1142.s: Augur and Devon reluctantly agree to take Caribou with them when he mentions he has useful information for Blackbeard. The Vice Admirals target Bonney to regain control of the Pacifistas, but Dorry and Brogy save Franky's group. However, when Kizaru's attack results in Vegapunk's death, a video message Vegapunk made begins a worldwide broadcast.

1143.t: Vegapunk's Secret Plan – A Tense Worldwide Broadcast
1143.s: Vegapunk gives the world ten minutes to prepare before he makes his announcement, as various areas do so. Luffy's attack is able to take out Kizaru, while the Giant Warrior Pirates advance. Realizing they have to stop Vegapunk's broadcast, St. Saturn begins to summon the other Elders to Egghead.

1144.t: The Worst Nightmare - The Five Elders Come Together
1144.s: After the other Elders arrive at Egghead in their transformed states, they separate to deal with the opposition. As Sanji contacts Nami to warn her of the situation, Usopp helps the Thousand Sunny safely arrive. As Zoro launches a powerful blow against Lucci, Dorry and Brogy arrive to assist Luffy.

1145.t: Friends Fight Together! Luffy and the Warriors of Elbaph
1145.s: After Mars breaks into Labophase and Jinbe dragged Zoro away, Mars gets the information from Lucci, allowing him to find York. Meanwhile, Luffy, Dorry, and Brogy fight off the Elders in their area while trying to escape as their mission is complete. Elsewhere, the Iron Giant starts moving around.

1146.t: An Imminent Threat - Stussy and Edison's Resolve
1146.s: Mars frees York and they begin searching for the source of Vegapunk's broadcast, as Luffy, Dorry, and Brogy continue their rush to the shore, Peter and Warcury at their backs. Meanwhile, Nusjuro and Saturn approach the two groups of Straw Hats and allies preparing to evacuate.

1147.t: A Stunning Conclusion - Vegapunk's Great Prediction
1147.s: As the chaos on Egghead continues, Mars falls for a fake Den Den Mushi, and is unable to stop Vegapunk's broadcast. Vegapunk addresses everyone watching and, declaring that they deserve to know the truth, states that the world will sink.

1148.t: The Lost History - Joy Boy, the First Pirate
1148.s: Vegapunk's broadcast is watched around the world, and his prediction of the day's earthquake begins to convince them of his truthfulness. As the Elders resolve to destroy every life form they can find in a desperate bid to stop the broadcast, Vegapunk elaborates on the sinking of the world, declaring his first two sins and beginning the story of Joy Boy, the first pirate.

1149.t: The Void Century - A Revelation About a Sinking World
1149.s: Vegapunk continues his broadcast, revealing that the world once sank beneath the sea due to a man-made cataclysm tied to the Ancient Weapons. He reveals the existence of the Mother Flame and its recent theft, apologizing for his accidental contribution to the destruction of Lulusia and shocking the world. Meanwhile, York notices an oddity in Vegapunk's story, and reaches the conclusion that the Den Den Mushi broadcasting his recording is hidden in the Iron Giant.

1150.t: Get the Ship Moving! The Iron Giant Activates
1150.s: While most of the Five Elders head to the Iron Giant, Nusjuro attempts to attack the Thousand Sunny, but is stopped by Zoro and Jinbe. The Giant Warrior Pirates on their captain's orders begin their counterattack against the Marine blockade to prepare for their departure, as Vice Admirals Doll and Bluegrass intercept them. Meanwhile, before Vegapunk can reveal information about the Will of D., the Elder's attack knocks the Iron Giant into the ocean, cutting off the transmission.

1151.t: Her and Her Father's Dream! Bonney's Free Future
1151.s: After getting on the Giant Warrior Pirates' ship, Luffy eats some food to re-enter Gear 5, and his encouragement enables Bonney to enter a Nika-based form. Knowing they have to remove the Elders from Egghead, Luffy's plan sends Mars flying away. As York reveals how to stop the broadcast permanently as it resumes and Atlas leaves to check on the Sunny group, the Iron Giant rises and saves the Giant ship from Warcury.

1152.t: Her Father and Mother's Legacy! Bonney's Nika Punch
1152.s: A flashback occurs, where Vegapunk learned Clover's true identity, and after the latter's death, took over his research. In the present, Atlas sacrifices herself so the Sunny can escape to sea, but not before knocking out Lilith so York cannot track her. As the broadcast reveals finding One Piece is tied to learning the true history which the Roger Pirates had learned, Peter attacks the Iron Giant, and Saturn attacks the Giant ship, but is stopped by Luffy and Bonney.

1153.t: The Upheaval of an Era! The Color of the Supreme King That Leads Luffy
1153.s: As Vegapunk reveals of how the fate of the world is tied to Pirates, causing reactions among the public and Marines, the next attack permanently shuts off the transmission. After Iron Giant asks Luffy his name, he uses a large amount of Joy Boy's Supreme King Haki to save Luffy and his allies. This knocks out the Marines, dispels the Elder's transformation and sends them minus Saturn back to Pangaea Castle.

1154.t: The Truth Behind the Secret Plan - Vegapunk Claims Victory
1154.s: With the Marines knocked out, the Straw Hats and Giant Warrior Pirates depart Egghead. As the Marines and Morgans deal with the aftermath of the incident, it is revealed that Vegapunk knew about York’s betrayal two weeks ago. He then set up his plan to spread the truth upon his death prior to having his memories erased so York would not know about this.

1155.t: The Promised Horizon - Off to the Long-Awaited Elbaph
1155.s: As the Straw Hat and Giant Warrior Pirates have a celebration after departing Egghead, Lilith assures Luffy they did not actually fail. Edison moves Punk Records out of York's reach and creates himself a new body. Saturn is killed by Imu for his failure, with Garling taking his place, the World Nobles are suffering from the food shortage, and Dragon decides to make a move before the world fights over habitable land.

1156.t: The Long-Sought Elbaph! The Big Reunion Banquet
1156.s: As the Straw Hat and Giant Warrior Pirates are celebrating, Blackbeard returns to Hachinosu enraged about the earlier events, but learns about Garp's capture and Mary Geoise's food shortage. Meanwhile, the Barto Club is spared by the Red Hair Pirates after Bartolomeo took responsibility, but their ship is destroyed as punishment, leaving their status unknown. By the next morning, the Thousand Sunny has disappeared with six of the Straw Hats aboard.

1157.t: Nami in a Fix! An Adventure in Block Kingdom
1157.s: As Nami wakes up in a mysterious castle wondering about her location, she is chased by a giant porcupine monster and sees Usopp caught by a giant cat monster. With Zeus' help she defeats the two monsters to save him. The cat recovers and transforms into a lion while pursuing them, but is defeated by Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji, whom like their crewmates are also confused by their predicament.

1158.t: A Quest in the Land of Mystery! The Secret of the Sun God
1158.s: After meeting a man who informs Luffy's group they are in a place called the Land of Gods ruled by the Sun God, the Straw Hats quickly discover it is actually part of a giant diorama. After rescuing Chopper and fighting off more giant animals, the Sun God returns, angry by what he sees. With the blueprints Nami and Chopper found, and a captured Iscat as their transportation, the Straw Hats plan their escape with the Sun God in pursuit.

1159.t: Destroy the Miniature Garden - Escape Block Kingdom
1159.s: The six Straw Hats continue with their escape from the Land of Gods, as Nami memorizes the blueprints and leads the group towards their destination. As they fight him off to avoid being recaptured, the Sun God is revealed to be a member of the New Giant Warrior Pirates. After an angry Nami uses Zeus to attack the Sun God, Luffy uses a Gear 4 technique to destroy the wall, allowing them to escape the Land of Gods.

1160.t: An Encounter on a Snowfield - Loki, the Accursed Prince
1160.s: At sea, the Giant Warrior Pirates give up their search for the missing Straw Hats, and resolve to meet them on Elbaph. Outside the Land of Gods, Luffy's group begins to cross a giant suspension bridge, when they are almost discovered by two giants; in the process, they learn that intruders are supposed to be arrested, putting them on guard. Suddenly sensing a powerful presence, Luffy jumps off the bridge to investigate, where he meets Loki, the "Accursed Prince" of Elbaph, and learns they have arrived in the land of the giants.

1161.t: A Dangerous Deal! Loki of the Underworld and Luffy
1161.s: During his conversation with Loki, Luffy learns that Loki knows Shanks, but Loki refuses to divulge any knowledge unless Luffy frees him. Zoro's group find themselves being chased by Road, with Gerd and Goldberg in pursuit. Meanwhile, Brook helps Robin prepare for her reunion with Saul as their ship arrives in Elbaph, as it is reported that Saul has collapsed.

1162.t: A Gargantuan Wave of Emotion - The Dreamlike Scenery of Elbaph
1162.s: Luffy meets up with Gerd and Goldberg and he joins them to deal with Road. They arrive just after Zoro and Sanji had managed to trap Road, with Gerd and Goldburg punishing Road for his actions. As they explore, Luffy's group reunites with Hajrudin, Dorry, Brogy and the other Straw Hats, and a quick narration by Louis Arnote is seen with a warning not to stay in Elbaph too long.

1163.t: I Want You to Praise Me - The Reunion of Robin and Saul
1163.s: Upon reaching Western Village, the Straw Hat Pirates head out with Gerd taking them to where Saul is for Robin to reunite with him. As Robin remembers what prompted her to continue living after the Ohara Incident, she learns about Saul being unconscious. Realizing he was faking it like before, once Saul wakes up, the two have an emotional reunion with the other Straw Hats watching.

1164.t: Saul's Resolve - The Inherited Will of Ohara
1164.s: After Luffy and Lilith formally introduces themselves to Saul, the group splits up to and head to different areas. Robin learns the books from Ohara are now part of the Owl Library, while Luffy and Usopp learn that due to a law passed by their late king the children are no longer being trained as warriors. Meanwhile, two intruders appear in the abandoned castle.

1165.t: A Welcome with Friends' Cups and Intruders Seeking Loki
1165.s: At the school, Luffy meets Colon, the only giant child interested in being a warrior, who attempts to fight him. Most of the Straw Hats then attend a banquet, where a tribute is made to them for everything they have done for the giants in the past, and Elbaph's leader Jarul soon arrives. Meanwhile at Aurust Castle, the two intruders torture the guards and demand to know Loki's location.

1166.t: Encountering Loki - Gunko of the Knights of God
1166.s: During the feast, Luffy learns more about Nika and the crimes Loki committed in the past. Wanting to find out what Loki knows about Shanks, Luffy, alongside Zoro, Nami, and Road set out on a Svarr to get the keys to the cuffs at the castle. Meanwhile, Loki refuses to join the Knights of God, and the female intruder demonstrates her power by killing a giant wolf.

1167.t: Shamrock Appears - Commander of the Knights of God
1167.s: Luffy's group arrive at Aurust Castle, where they notice signs of the recent attack. While exploring, Road tells the three Straw Hats about their late King Harald, as well as Hajrudin being Harald's son and what lead Hajrudin to his dream. Meanwhile, Loki is assaulted by Gunko, when her companion decides to take over as he is revealed to resemble Shanks.

1168.t: Ancient History - The Harley Passed Down by Elbaph
1168.s: Before striking him down, Shamrock reveals to Loki that he is Shanks' twin brother. Luffy is in disbelief over Shanks' actions when the guards reveal what happened. Meanwhile, Robin and Chopper with Saul and Franky with Ripley learn of the Harley, which provides the ancient legends regarding Joy Boy and the foretelling of an upcoming world-wide event.

1169.t: The Legend Lurking in Elbaph - The Identity of the Mountain-Eater
1169.s: While exploring the castle, Luffy's group meets the mysterious Mr. Ya, who is both Ripley's husband and Colon's father. Sanji's group elsewhere learns that Mr. Ya is actually Scopper Goban, who was a key member of the Roger Pirates, alongside Roger and Rayleigh. Upon leading the group to Loki's key 7, Gaban challenges Luffy to a fight for possession of it

1170.t: Get the Key! Luffy vs. Scopper Gaban
